items.title: Major Russia drone and missile attack kills several, wounds dozens in Ukraine
items.summary: Russia launched more than 660 drones and missiles at Ukraine overnight on Friday killing four people and injuring more than 30, Ukrainian officials said. Major strikes hit buildings in the eastern city of Dnipro where, on Saturday morning, rescue teams were searching for people trapped under rubble.

items.title: Head of OpenAI apologises for failing to alert police ahead of Canada mass shooting
items.summary: The head of OpenAI – the research company that developed ChatGPT – has apologised for failing to alert the police to a user the company had flagged for her interest in "violent activities", who later went on to kill members of her family before carrying out a mass shooting at a secondary school in Canada.

items.title: First female Archbishop of Canterbury to meet Pope Leo
items.summary: New Archbishop of Canterbury Sarah Mullally, the first woman to lead the world's Anglican Christians, heads to Rome and the Vatican this weekend for an audience with Pope Leo XIV.

items.title: Middle East war live: US envoys expected in Islamabad as Iran rules out direct talks
items.summary: US envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner  are expected to arrive in Islamabad on Saturday for peace talks with Iran in the latest attempt by the US to broker a peace deal. Although Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi arrived in Pakistan on Friday, Iran has ruled out direct negotiations with US representatives. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.

items.title: Palestinians vote in local elections as polls open for first time since Gaza war
items.summary: Palestinians take to the polls on Saturday, for the first time since the Gaza war, to vote in municipal elections. There are no Hamas candidates on electoral lists, which are mostly aligned with president Mahmud Abbas's secular-nationalist Fatah party or independents.

items.title: Iran's FM Araghchi arrives in Pakistan ahead of planned US ceasefire talks
items.summary: Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi arrived in the Pakistani ​capital Islamabad on Friday to discuss proposals for restarting peace talks with the United States, amid conflicting signals on whether he would meet with US negotiators there. The White House said special envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner would leave for Pakistan on Saturday morning to continue talks with Iran.

Also, 518 people killed in the post-election violence that followed last octobeer presidential election in Tanzania that is the official figure issued by a government-appointed commission of inquiry. items.title: 'Information leakage to our adversaries': When prediction markets spiral out of control
items.summary: A US Army soldier has been indicted on Thursday for using classified military intelligence to place winning bets on former Venezuelan leader Nicolas Maduro's capture. This is the latest and most explosive case in a growing pattern of insider trading on prediction markets such as Polymarket and Kalshi.

items.title: Tanzania releases government-led inquiry into poll violence
items.summary: In tonight's edition, a Tanzanian commission appointed by the President herself, releases its report into last year’s election violence. Also, Pope Leo wraps up his first major international tour with a Mass in Equatorial Guinea. And Congolese music star Fally Ipupa marks 20 years in the industry with new albums and concerts in Paris.

items.title: Iran: Neither war nor Peace, Ukraine’s Lifeline, Starmer: “Just a Scratch”?
items.summary: In a week where a stalemate appears to have developed after nearly two months of asymmetric conflict between the US and Iran, President Trump’s Truth Social posts have swung between belligerent maximalism and breezy deal-making—one minute suggesting a within-reach deal, and that Iranian forces would personally help their enemy confiscate what he called its “nuclear dust” and move it to America.

items.title: En Ukraine, une frappe russe sur Dnipro fait au moins deux morts et 21 blessés
items.summary: Une attaque de drones et missile russes a fait plusieurs morts et des dizaines de blessés en Ukraine dans la nuit de vendredi à samedi. Elle a visé la ville ukrainienne de Dnipro, dans le centre-est du pays, et plusieurs autres régions ukrainiennes. Volodymyr Zelensky a appelé à avancer vers un vingt-et-unième paquet de sanctions européennes contre la Russie, alors qu'un nouveau paquet de sanctions vient d'être adopté par les Vingt-Sept à Chypre.

translation.title: In Ukraine, a Russian strike on Dnipro killed at least two people and wounded 21
translation.summary: A Russian drone and missile attack killed several people and injured dozens in Ukraine during the night of Friday to Saturday. It targeted the Ukrainian city of Dnipro, in the eastern centre of the country, and several other Ukrainian regions. Volodymyr Zelensky called for progress towards a twenty-first package of European sanctions against Russia, while a new package of sanctions has just been adopted by the Twenty-Seven in Cyprus.

items.title: Le clonage d’acteurs de cinéma douche l’enthousiasme chinois pour l’IA
items.summary: Le géant chinois du streaming iQiYi a lancé une base de données d’avatars d’acteurs réels générés par l’IA pour d’éventuels films à venir. Dans un pays où l’IA est pourtant déjà très intégrée dans l’industrie cinématographique, cette nouvelle initiative semble avoir été la goutte de trop.

translation.title: Cloning movie actors shower Chinese enthusiasm for AI
translation.summary: The Chinese streaming giant iQiYi has launched a database of real actors generated by the AI for possible upcoming films. In a country where AI is already very integrated into the film industry, this new initiative seems to have been too much.

items.title: Le PDG d'OpenAI s'excuse pour le rôle joué par ChatGPT dans une fusillade de masse au Canada
items.summary: Sam Altman, le PDG d'OpenAI, s'est excusé vendredi pour le rôle joué par ChatGPT dans la tuerie de masse qui avait fait huit morts et une vingtaine de blessés au Canada en février. Le compte de son auteure avait été suspendu quelques mois avant la fusillade pour des messages inquiétants, mais OpenAI n'avait pas alerté la police.

translation.title: OpenAI CEO Apologies for ChatGPT's Role in Mass Shooting in Canada
translation.summary: Sam Altman, the CEO of OpenAI, apologized on Friday for ChatGPT's role in the mass killing that killed eight and wounded some 20 people in Canada in February. The author's account had been suspended a few months before the shooting for disturbing messages, but OpenAI had not alerted the police.

items.title: Des Palestiniens appelés à voter aux municipales pour le premier scrutin depuis la guerre à Gaza
items.summary: Les bureaux de vote ont ouvert, samedi, pour des élections municipales à Deir-el-Balah, dans le centre de Gaza, et en Cisjordanie occupée. En tout dans les deux régions, plus de deux millions de personnes sont inscrites sur les listes électorales. La plupart des listes sont alignées avec le Fatah, parti du président palestinien Mahmoud Abbas et aucune ne se réclame du Hamas. Ce scrutin est le premier organisé depuis le début de la guerre à Gaza.

translation.title: Palestinians called to vote in municipal elections for the first time since the war in Gaza
translation.summary: The polling stations opened on Saturday for municipal elections in Deir-el-Balah in central Gaza and in the occupied West Bank. In all, more than two million people are registered in both regions. Most of the lists are aligned with Fatah, a party of Palestinian President Mahmoud Abbas, and none claims Hamas. This election is the first since the beginning of the war in Gaza.

items.title: En direct : les émissaires américains attendus au Pakistan pour des pourparlers avec l'Iran
items.summary: Une délégation américaine composée de l'émissaire du président américain Steve Witkoff et de son gendre, Jared Kushner, est attendue samedi à Islamabad pour des négociations avec l'Iran, alors que le ministre iranien des Affaires étrangères, Abbas Araghchi, est arrivé la veille pour des entretiens avec de hauts responsables pakistanais. Aucune rencontre directe n'est prévue entre les deux parties, a annoncé un porte-parole de la diplomatie iranienne. Suivez notre direct.

translation.title: Live: US envoys expected in Pakistan for talks with Iran
translation.summary: An American delegation composed of US President Steve Witkoff's emissary and his son-in-law, Jared Kushner, is expected on Saturday in Islamabad for negotiations with Iran, while Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi arrived the day before for talks with senior Pakistani officials. There are no direct meetings between the two sides, a spokesman for Iranian diplomacy said. Follow our direct.

items.title: Le chef de la diplomatie iranienne à Islamabad pour négocier avec les États-Unis
items.summary: Abbas Araghchi, le chef de la diplomatie iranienne, est arrivé vendredi à Islamabad, au Pakistan, avant une deuxième session de pourparlers entre l'Iran et les États-Unis. Le ministre iranien des Affaires étrangères va échanger avec des hauts dirigeants pakistanais, mais il ne devrait pas rencontrer directement les émissaires américains.

translation.title: Head of Iranian diplomacy in Islamabad to negotiate with the United States
translation.summary: Abbas Araghchi, the head of Iranian diplomacy, arrived Friday in Islamabad, Pakistan, before a second session of talks between Iran and the United States. The Iranian Foreign Minister is going to chat with senior Pakistani leaders, but he should not meet directly with the US envoys.

items.title: Manifestations post-électorales en Tanzanie : 518 morts selon un bilan officiel du gouvernement
items.summary: La Tanzanie a enfin dévoilé le rapport tant attendu sur les violences post-électorales survenues après la présidentielle d’octobre dernier. Selon la commission d’enquête nommée par le gouvernement, 518 personnes ont été tuées durant ces événements dramatiques, un chiffre bien en deçà de celui dénombré par certaines ONG.

translation.title: Post-election demonstrations in Tanzania: 518 deaths according to official government record
translation.summary: Tanzania finally unveiled the long-awaited report on post-election violence following the presidential elections last October. According to the government-appointed commission of inquiry, 518 people were killed during these dramatic events, a figure well below that of some NGOs.

items.title: La tentative d'assassinat de Donald Trump, une mise en scène ?
items.summary: C'est une théorie qui connait un grand essor aux États-Unis : la tentative d'assassinat dont a été victime Donald Trump pendant la dernière campagne américaine aurait, en réalité, été mise en scène ? Alors que les doutes émergeaient à l'origine du camp démocrate, ce sont des figures originelles du mouvement MAGA qui les expriment et les diffusent. Donald Trump voit-il se retourner contre lui le "monstre conspirationniste" qu'il a créé ? Info Intox avec Jules BOITEAU.

translation.title: The attempted murder of Donald Trump, a staging?
translation.summary: This is a theory that is booming in the United States: the assassination attempt that Donald Trump was killed in the last US campaign would actually have been staged? While doubts arose at the origin of the Democratic camp, they were expressed and disseminated by the original figures of the MAGA movement. Does Donald Trump see himself turning against him the "conspiracy monster" he created? Info Intox with Jules BOITEAU.

items.title: La méthode Kompany au Bayern Munich, Mondial 2026 et Lamine Yamal blessé
items.summary: Le Bayern Munich est déjà champion et peut encore tout gagner cette saison. Sous la férule de Vincent Kompany, le club bavarois a retrouvé autorité et cohérence depuis son arrivée l’an dernier. Le technicien belge, peu attendu à ce niveau, impose sa méthode et ses choix. Kompany, l’éclosion d’un grand entraîneur ?

translation.title: Kompany method in Bayern Munich, World 2026 and Lamine Yamal injured
translation.summary: Bayern Munich is already a champion and can still win everything this season. Under Vincent Kompany's ferule, the Bavarian club has regained authority and coherence since its arrival last year. The Belgian technician, little expected at this level, imposes his method and his choices. Kompany, the outbreak of a great coach?

items.title: Washington envisagerait de retirer l'Espagne de l'Otan, Pedro Sanchez ne s'estime "pas inquiet"
items.summary: Les États-Unis réfléchiraient à suspendre l'Espagne de l'Otan, selon des informations de l'agence Reuters. Le Premier ministre espagnol, Pedro Sanchez, a déclaré vendredi ne pas avoir "d'inquiétude" à ce sujet, car aucun article du traité de l'Alliance ne prévoit la suspension ou l'exclusion d'un des membres.

translation.title: Washington would consider withdrawing Spain from NATO, Pedro Sanchez does not feel "not worried"
translation.summary: The United States would consider suspending NATO Spain, according to information from Reuters. The Spanish Prime Minister, Pedro Sanchez, said on Friday that he had no "concerns" about this, as there is no article in the Alliance Treaty that provides for the suspension or exclusion of one of the members.

items.summary: 大美中国，江山如画。 党的十八大以来，习近平总书记的考察足迹遍及神州大地。祁连山麓、坝上林海，秦岭深处、黄河之滨，总书记在大江奔涌处谋划千秋大计，在山川锦绣间擘画生态蓝图。一系列重要论述，为新时代生态文明建设提供了根本遵循和行动指南。  世界环境日到来之际，我们跟随习近平总书记的脚步，一起呵护山水、寄情山水，领悟守护绿水青山、建设生态文明之道。  江河为脉 心系长江之变，习近平总书记前往沿江重镇，考察长江经济带发展。从三峡库区到洞庭湖畔，从港口码头到企业车间，总书记深入调研，作出一系列重要指示，为新时代江河保护治理提供了重要遵循。  2018年4月，习近平总书记来到湖南岳阳城陵矶水文站考察。在狭窄的站房外长廊上，习近平总书记举目远眺。“共抓大保护，不搞大开发”的战略定力，在这里化作守护一江碧水的坚定行动。  2023年10月10日下午，习近平总书记在江西九江市考察，冒雨在江边察看，了解当地长江国家文化公园建设、长江岸线生态修复等情况。10月12日，总书记在进一步推动长江经济带高质量发展座谈会上回顾长江经济带发展历程，感慨：“做就要做好，坚定做下去。笃行不怠，一以贯之，久久为功。” 黄河

items.title: 学习手记 | “环境就是民生”
items.summary: 6月5日是世界环境日，也是我国环境保护法确立的环境日。 22年前的这一天，在时任浙江省委书记习近平部署推动下，以农村人居环境整治为重点的“千万工程”启动。 当时，习近平同志担任浙江省委书记刚半年多，工作千头万绪。他何以将农村人居环境整治作为重点工作？ 在基层调研时，习近平同志发现，在浙江经济快速发展的同时，广大农村却面临“成长的烦恼”，村庄面貌不如人意。 全省3.4万个村庄中，人居环境较好的仅4000个。有人形容：“走过一村又一村，村村都是垃圾村。”还有农民这样描述：“起早贪黑赚钞票，垃圾堆里数钞票，躺在医院花钞票。”可以说，人居环境整治是当时浙江农村群众的一个迫切期盼。 “千万工程”聚焦乡亲们走什么村道、怎么处理畜禽粪便等小问题，却直接关系农民获得感、幸福感，是实打实的民生大事。 老百姓的生活环境如何，习近平同志念兹在兹： 上世纪70年代，在陕北冯家坪公社赵家河大队驻点时，他撸起袖管，一石一瓦盖起村里第一个男女分开的厕所； 到正定工作，不仅大力推进“人拉猪吃”的“连茅圈”改造工作，还拿着大扫帚走上街头搞卫生，推动成立全县第一支专职卫生清洁队； 任福州市委书记，亲自为建造垃圾处理场选址

translation.title: Learn the handbooks.
translation.summary: 5 June is World Environment Day and the environmental day established by our environmental protection laws. Twenty-two years ago, with the deployment of Xi Jinping, then Secretary-General of Zhejiang Province, the “millions of projects” focusing on the environmental rehabilitation of rural settlements were launched. At that time, Comrade Xi had been the secretary of the Zhejiang province for more than six months and had been working for a long time. Why does he focus on the rehabilitation of the rural habitat environment? At the grass-roots level, Comrade Xi found that while the Zhejiang economy was growing rapidly, the rural areas were faced with “growth problems” and the villages were less than satisfactory. Out of 34,000 villages in the province, only 4,000 have a better habitat. It was described as “a village after a village, which is full of garbage”. And the farmers described it as: “Getting up early and making money, counting it in the trash, spending it in the hospital.” It can be said that the remediation of the habitat environment was an urgent aspiration of the rural population of Zhejiang at the time. The fact that millions of projects focus on small problems such as what villages to follow and how to deal with animal and animal dung is a matter of life for the farmers. items.summary: 新华社合肥6月5日电 中共中央政治局委员、国务院副总理刘国中3日至5日到安徽调研“三夏”农业生产工作。他强调，要深入学习贯彻习近平总书记关于国家粮食安全的重要论述，按照党中央、国务院部署，扛稳政治责任，毫不放松抓好夏收夏种夏管，全力以赴夺取夏粮丰收，全面打牢秋粮生产基础，确保完成全年粮食生产目标任务。 刘国中先后来到宿州市、淮南市、六安市，深入小麦机收和夏播现场、农机跨区作业服务点、农事服务中心、粮食仓储中心、地方农科院等，实地察看夏收夏种、农机作业服务保障、粮食烘干收储等工作，详细了解农作物新品种选育、大面积单产提升、农资保供稳价、高标准农田建设等情况。 刘国中强调，“三夏”工作抓得好不好，事关全年粮食生产目标任务能否顺利实现。当前正值“三夏”农业生产关键时期，要抓住有利天气抢晴收获，组织好农机跨区作业，强化服务保障和安全管理，确保夏收高效进行。要抓实抓牢机收减损、烘干晾晒等各项措施，最大程度减少粮食损失。要精心做好夏粮收购工作，引导各类企业积极入市，保障粮食市场平稳运行。要压茬推进夏播，加强农资供应和农事服务，强化技术集成及推广应用，落实落细合理密植、精量播种等大面积单产提升措施，

items.title: 韩正会见中美高级别二轨对话美方代表团
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 6月5日，国家副主席韩正在北京会见中美高级别二轨对话美方代表团。 韩正表示，中美关系是当今世界最重要的双边关系之一。当前，中美关系处于关键历史节点。中美相互尊重、和平共处、合作共赢，不仅有利于两国，也有利于世界和平与发展。希望中美高级别二轨对话能不断汇聚两国有识之士的真知灼见，增进美国各界对中国的了解和理解，共同推动中美关系稳定、健康、可持续发展。 美方表示，美中高级别二轨对话有助于双方更好理解对方，为两国关系发展提供更多有益思路。中国经济发展令人钦佩，双方应加强贸易、投资等领域对话合作。

translation.title: Han is meeting with the United States delegation to the High-level Second Track Dialogue between China and the United States
translation.summary: On 5 June, the Vice-President of Xinhua, Han, met in Beijing with the United States delegation to the High-level Second Track Dialogue between China and the United States. Han is saying that Chinese-American relations are one of the most important bilateral relations in the world today. Currently, US-China relations are at a critical historical node. Mutual respect, peaceful coexistence and co-operation between China and the United States are beneficial not only to both countries but also to world peace and development. It is to be hoped that the high-level second-track dialogue between China and the United States will continue to bring together the insights of knowledgeable people from the two countries, enhance understanding and understanding of China among the United States, and work together to promote stable, healthy and sustainable relations between China and the United States. The United States side stated that the two sides would benefit from a better understanding of each other and from more useful ideas for the development of their relations. China ' s economic development was admirable, and the two sides should strengthen dialogue and cooperation in the areas of trade and investment.

items.title: 国务院印发《关于开展第四次全国农业普查的通知》
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电　国务院日前印发《关于开展第四次全国农业普查的通知》（以下简称《通知》）。根据《中华人民共和国统计法》和《全国农业普查条例》规定，国务院决定于2026年开展第四次全国农业普查。 　　《通知》强调，第四次全国农业普查是在以中国式现代化全面推进中华民族伟大复兴的新征程上开展的一项重大国情国力调查，要以习近平新时代中国特色社会主义思想为指导，深入贯彻党的二十大和二十届二中、三中全会精神，认真落实党中央、国务院决策部署，坚持依法普查、科学普查、为民普查，坚持实事求是、守正创新，全面摸清新时代我国“三农”家底，客观反映农业发展新情况、乡村建设新面貌、农民生活新变化、农村改革新成效。 　　《通知》指出，第四次全国农业普查的对象是在中华人民共和国境内的农村住户，包括农村农业生产经营户和其他住户；城镇农业生产经营户；农业生产经营单位；村民委员会；乡镇人民政府。普查的主要内容包括农业生产条件、粮食和大食物生产情况、农业新质生产力情况、乡村发展基本情况、农村居民生活情况等。普查的标准时点为2026年12月31日24时，时期资料为2026年年度资料。 　　《通知》要求，各地区、各部门要按

translation.summary: Xinhua News Service, Beijing, 5 June In accordance with the Statistical Law of the People ' s Republic of China and the Regulations on the National Agricultural Census, the State Council decided to conduct the Fourth National Agricultural Census in 2026. The Circular stressed that the Fourth National Agricultural Census was a major national survey on the new quest for a comprehensive revival of the Chinese nation through China's modernization, guided by the Chinese socialist ideology of Xi Jinping's new era, and guided by the spirit of the 20th and 20th China-China Congresses, and by the serious implementation of the Party's central and State Council's decision-making process. It was determined that the census should be conducted in accordance with the law, that the scientific census should be conducted and that the census should be conducted for the people's census, that it should be carried out in accordance with the law, that it should be carried out in a realistic and innovative manner, and that the “three farmers” of the new era should be thoroughly examined in order to objectively reflect new developments in agricultural development, new aspects of rural construction, new changes in rural life and new effects of rural reform. The Circular states that the Fourth National Agricultural Survey is aimed at rural households in the People ' s Republic of China, including rural agricultural producers and other households; urban agricultural producers; agricultural production units; villagers ' committees; and town and town people ' s governments. The main elements of the census include agricultural production conditions, food and food production, new quality of agricultural productivity, basics of rural development, living conditions of rural residents, etc. The standard time of the census is 2400 hours on 31 December 2026, and the data for the period is annual 2026. items.title: 中央军委主席习近平签署命令 发布《军事设施建设条例》
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 中央军委主席习近平日前签署命令，发布《军事设施建设条例》，自2025年8月1日起施行。 条例深入贯彻习近平强军思想，深入贯彻新时代军事战略方针，聚焦服务备战打仗，适应新的领导指挥体制和保障模式，科学规范军事设施建设的基本原则、管理体制、运行机制和工作制度，是军事设施建设工作的重要依据。 条例共11章63条，按照军委管总、战区主战、军种主建的总原则，围绕理顺建设链、管理链、监督链，重点从军事设施建设计划管理、项目审批、工程发包、勘察设计、施工管理、应急建设、安全保密、监督问责等方面，厘清管理权限，优化流程机制，固化实践成果，为提高军事设施建设质量效益和保障能力提供有力法治保障。

translation.title: The President of the Central Military Commission, Xi Jinping, signed an order to issue regulations on the construction of military installations
translation.summary: Xinhua News Agency, Beijing, 5 June The regulations further implement Xi Jinping ' s military doctrine, the strategic military approach of the new era, the focus on service preparation for combat, the adaptation of the new model of command and control, and the scientific regulation of the basic principles of the construction of military facilities, the regulatory framework, the operational mechanisms and the working system, are important bases for the construction of military facilities. In accordance with the general principles of the Military Commission ' s General Administration, the main war zone and military construction, the regulations provide for the clarification of management competencies, the optimization of process mechanisms, the consolidation of practical results and the provision of robust rule of law guarantees for the quality and safety of military facilities, in accordance with the general principles of the Military Commission, chapter 11, section 63, and the streamlining of the construction chain, the management chain and the chain of supervision, with emphasis on the management of the military facilities construction plan, project approval, engineering contracting, survey design, construction management, emergency response, security confidentiality and oversight accountability.

items.title: 中共中央办公厅印发《党组讨论和决定党员处分事项工作程序规定》

The text of the Working Procedures Provisions for the Discussion and Decision of the Members of the Party Groups is reproduced below. (b) To apply the spirit of reform and strict criteria to govern the party, to ensure that the party group (including the party committee of its nature, together with the other party members) is fully accountable to the party ' s principals, to strengthen the monitoring role of the monitoring and oversight bodies (hereinafter referred to as the accredited bodies) and to promote a culture of discipline and anti-corruption with a strict tone, strict measures and strict atmosphere. Article 3 imposes party disciplinary sanctions on members of the party ' s group management, and the inspection and inspection committee (hereinafter referred to as the sent-in agency) appointed by the party ' s team, the disciplinary committee (hereinafter referred to as the sent-in agency) and the accredited body, among others, shall perform their duties in accordance with the established competencies and procedures, enhance coordination and communication, establish an orderly and smooth line of communication and work together to achieve political, disciplinary and social coherence. items.title: 全国人大常委会启动节约能源法执法检查
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 为推动节约能源法全面有效实施，促进更高水平、更高质量做好节能工作，全国人大常委会5日启动节约能源法执法检查。 节约能源法自1998年1月1日实施，并于2007年、2016年、2018年进行了修改。 记者5日从全国人大常委会节约能源法执法检查组第一次全体会议上了解到，为全面深入了解法律实施情况，此次执法检查采取实地检查与委托检查相结合的方式，检查组将赴天津、江苏、湖南、广东、广西、四川等省（区、市）开展实地检查，并委托北京、河北、山西、吉林、上海、重庆等省（市）人大常委会对本行政区域内节约能源法实施情况进行检查。检查组将采取实地检查、听取汇报、组织座谈、典型调研、专题研究、抽查暗访等多种方式，全面准确了解法律实施情况，对带有普遍性的问题深入调查研究。 检查组将重点检查8方面内容：落实节能管理制度情况，推进重点领域节能工作情况，重点用能单位节能管理情况，推动节能技术进步情况，实施节能激励措施情况，与法律配套的行政法规、部门规章以及地方性法规的制定情况，法律实施中存在的其他问题，对节约能源法修改的意见和建议。

translation.title: The Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress initiated an energy-saving law enforcement inspection
translation.summary: In order to promote the full and effective implementation of the Energy Conservation Act and to promote higher and higher-quality energy efficiency, the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress launched an energy conservation law enforcement inspection on 5 June. The Energy Conservation Act has been in force since 1 January 1998 and was amended in 2007, 2016 and 2018. On 5 May, journalists learned from the first plenary meeting of the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress ' s Standing Committee on Energy Conservation Law Enforcement Inspection Unit that, in order to obtain a comprehensive and in-depth understanding of the implementation of the law, the inspection took the form of a combination of on-site inspections and commissioned inspections, which will be carried out in the provinces (districts and municipalities) of Tianjin, Jiangsu, Hunan, Guangdong, Guangxi, Sichuan and Beijing, Hebei, Shanxi, Jilin, Shanghai and Chongqing, among others. The Unit will have a comprehensive and accurate understanding of the implementation of the law and will conduct in-depth research and studies on issues of a general nature, in a variety of ways, including on-site inspections, debriefings, organization of talks, typical research, thematic studies, spot-checking and unannounced visits. The Unit will focus on eight areas: implementation of energy-saving management systems; promotion of energy-saving efforts in priority areas; focus on energy-saving management in energy-use units; promotion of technological progress in energy-saving; implementation of energy-saving incentives; development of administrative, sectoral and local regulations in conjunction with the law; other issues in the implementation of the law; and suggestions and recommendations for changes to the energy-saving law.
